news.t: Beyond JEPI: Exploring JP Morgan's Active ETF Bench
J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges

overview.description: The JPMorgan Core Plus Bond ETF (JCPB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed ETF consisting of a broad array of fixed income securities. JCPB was launched on Jan 28, 2019 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
